    Compare any three aircraft.

    Drawn to true relative scale from sourced figures — against a 1.8 m person and a double-decker bus — with every specification side by side. Same metres, same pixels, no artistic licence.

    The numbers

    Every specification, side by side

    Green marks the largest figure in each row. Every number comes from the sourced spec table on that aircraft's own page. Spot an error? business@luck.fyi

    Popular matchups

    The ones everybody asks about

    Every other combination — all 903 of them — lives in the tool above. These six get a page of their own because they are the ones people actually search for.

    Airbus A380 vs Boeing 747

    About the data. Every specification is compiled from manufacturer documents and cited per row. Operator fleet counts are approximate snapshots, marked ≈ and dated; individually verified figures carry a ✓. All silhouettes are original works of aircraft.fyi, drawn to true scale. Corrections and enquiries: business@luck.fyi — we fix errors visibly, not silently.
